creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
While attempting to install the "x11-themes/kde4-wallpapers" port, the following error message is displayed:

fetch: http://mirrors.isc.org/pub/kde/stable/4.7.4/src/kde-wallpapers-4.7.4.tar.bz2: size mismatch: expected 35410944, actual 49225105

This error message is displayed no matter what mirror site is tried.

How-To-Repeat: Attempt to download the port
